title: Universities
description: Partnerships with Universities Sandia’s University Partnership strategy is to establish enduring partnerships with a focused set of universities to nurture talent, collaborative research, and national advocacy. What’s in it for each partner? Partnering brings benefits to Universities and Sandia. Collaborations leverage each partner’s resources to meet common or compatible goals. For Universities, partnerships with Sandia […]
text:
Sandia’s University Partnership strategy is to establish enduring partnerships with a focused set of universities to nurture talent, collaborative research, and national advocacy.
What’s in it for each partner?
Partnering brings benefits to Universities and Sandia. Collaborations leverage each partner’s resources to meet common or compatible goals.
